title: Tinian (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tinian''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Tinian (species)]], a species 
*[[Tinian Codex]], an artifact created by the Tinians
*[[Unidentified Tinian planet]], the planet where the Tinians lived

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Tinian Hanther]] was a [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] agent during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*[[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin]] was a bounty hunter and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==[[In-universe|Out of Universe]]==
*[[Tinian on Trial]], a short story written by [[Kathy Tyers]]

{{Disambig}}
